"E:\Program Files\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\dungeon.dir/objects.a
E:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\dungeon.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\dungeon.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\MinGW\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\dungeon.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o dungeon.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libdungeon.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\dungeon.dir\linkLibs.rsp
